title: Planner agent prompt requires recording package-manager ambiguity instead of guessing
expectedSnippets: If package-manager evidence is ambiguous, do not guess.
forbiddenSnippets: guess a package manager despite ambiguous evidence

title: Worker prompt keeps retryable blockers in the current feature loop until recovery or real blockage
expectedSnippets: Repeat until review passes or a real blocker remains.
retryable non-human blockers may return the feature directly to ready/pending
forbiddenSnippets: stop after the first review failure

title: Reviewer agent prompt stays read-only and keeps needs_fix as the execution gate
expectedSnippets: Return needs_fix when the current feature should continue
